Product Details
PTFE Composite Seals

Composite sealing structures that combine PTFE sliding performance with elastomer energizing for advanced hydraulic and process applications.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

PTFE Composite Seals

A versatile option when equipment needs both low friction behavior and more stable energizing under pressure.

CHX PTFE Composite Seals use PTFE-based sealing elements together with elastomer or support components to improve sealing efficiency, wear behavior, and media compatibility in demanding systems.

Low Friction Surface

PTFE-based running surfaces help reduce drag and improve motion quality.

Pressure Energizing

Composite structures can improve sealing response and dimensional stability.

Media Versatility

Suitable for hydraulic fluids, industrial oils, and a broad range of process media.
